faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.description: Answers to the questions most often asked by our partners, beneficiaries and visitors.

items.question: How can I become a partner or sponsor of LIAM Groupe?
items.answer: Simply fill in the contact form and select 'Partnership' as the subject, or message us directly on WhatsApp. Our team gets back to you within 48 hours to discuss your project.

items.question: How do I register for an upcoming event?
items.answer: Go to the Events page, find the event you're interested in and click 'Register'. A quick form lets us collect your details and confirm your spot.

items.question: Can I volunteer with LIAM Groupe?
items.answer: Yes! We regularly welcome volunteers across our programs (G-Fitness, O'GAB, Youth Training…). Contact us and let us know which area interests you.

items.question: Does LIAM Groupe operate outside of Bangui?
items.answer: Our headquarters are in Bangui, but several of our programs are gradually expanding to other prefectures, notably through our institutional partnerships.

items.question: How can I follow your news?
items.answer: Our News page is updated regularly, and you can also follow us on Facebook, Instagram and WhatsApp to stay up to date.

slides.title: Innovation · Ambition · Mission
slides.description: Founded in 2015 in Bangui, LIAM Groupe is a Central African NGO working for sustainable community development through social innovation, sports, female entrepreneurship, and culture.

slides.title: A Central Africa where everyone thrives
slides.description: A Central Africa where every woman and young person has the tools to thrive and actively contribute to national development.

slides.title: The faces of LIAM Groupe
slides.description: A passionate and determined team that puts its expertise at the service of the Central African community.

about.intro1: LIAM Groupe is a multidisciplinary organization developing projects with strong social, cultural, sporting, entrepreneurial and culinary impact in the Central African Republic.
about.intro2: Our name embodies three core values: <1>Innovation</1> in our approaches, <2>Ambition</2> in our goals, and <3>Mission</3> in our unwavering commitment to Central African youth and women.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.text: To be a benchmark player in entrepreneurship, culture, sport and gastronomy in Central Africa.

missionBlock.title: Our mission
missionBlock.text: Reveal talents and create lasting opportunities.

team.title: The faces of LIAM Groupe
team.description: A passionate and determined team that puts its expertise at the service of the Central African community.

items.text: Pursuing sustainable growth and the success of talents.
Acting with a clear sense of social and economic value.

contact.title: Stay in touch
contact.intro: Our team is based in Bangui and available to discuss your projects, partnership ideas, or any questions about our programs.
contact.socialText: Stay informed about our news and events.

responses.about: Founded in 2015 in Bangui, LIAM Groupe is a Central African NGO working for sustainable community development through social innovation, sports, female entrepreneurship, community gastronomy, and youth training. Our mission: reveal talents and create lasting opportunities in the Central African Republic.
responses.programs:
LIAM Groupe operates in 6 areas:
🏋️ G-Fitness — sports & well-being
🍲 O'GAB — community gastronomy
💼 Entrepreneurship & Women's Leadership
📚 Youth Training
📢 Communication & Media
🎭 Events & Culture
Would you like to know more about a specific area?
responses.events: Find all our upcoming events on our Events page: sports tournaments, conferences, cooking workshops, charity galas… Check our calendar to stay updated! 👉 Head over to the Events page on our website.
responses.volunteer: We would be delighted to welcome you as a volunteer! You can join us on our various programs (G-Fitness, O'GAB, Youth Training…). Leave your details below and a team member will get back to you.
responses.partner: We're thrilled by your interest! To become a partner or sponsor, you can contact us via the form below or directly on WhatsApp. Our team will get back to you within 48 hours.
responses.news: You can follow all our news on the News page of our website, and join us on Facebook, Instagram and WhatsApp to never miss our actions and events!
responses.location:
Our headquarters is located at:
Avenue des Martyrs, Immeuble Salle King
Bangui, Central African Republic
📞 Contact us at +236 76 00 00 00
responses.contact: Perfect! Leave us your details below and our team will get back to you shortly.

sections.heading: Site publisher
sections.text: This site is published by {{name}}, a non-profit organization headquartered at {{address}}. Contact: {{email}}.

sections.heading: Hosting
sections.text: The site is hosted by third-party technical providers (web and media hosting) ensuring its availability and security.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.text: All content on this site (text, images, logos, videos) is the property of {{name}} or its partners, unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction without prior authorization is prohibited.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.text: {{name}} strives to ensure the accuracy of the information published on this site, without guaranteeing that it is free of errors or omissions.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.text: For any question regarding this legal notice, you can write to us at {{email}}.

sections.heading: Data collected
sections.text: We only collect the information you voluntarily provide through our contact, registration or newsletter forms (name, email, phone, message).

sections.heading: Use of data
sections.text: This information is used solely to respond to your requests, manage registrations for our events, and keep you informed of our news if you have opted in.

sections.heading: Data sharing
sections.text: Your data is never sold or transferred to third parties. It may be shared with our technical providers (hosting, messaging) solely to ensure the site runs properly.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.text: In accordance with personal data protection principles, you may at any time request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data by writing to us at {{email}}.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.text: This site may use technical cookies necessary for its proper functioning (language preference, anonymized statistics).
